name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Lolbin PressAnyKey and Download Activity
notes:
This Building Block detects a certain command line flag combination used by devinit.exe lolbin to download arbitrary MSI packages on a Windows system.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: NodejsTools PressAnyKey Lolbin
SIGMA Description: Detects a certain command line flag combination used by Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe that can be used to execute any other binary


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Lolbin PressAnyKey and Download Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%microsoft.nodejstools.pressanykey.exe normal %' or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe normal %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe')) or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -t msi-install %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -i http%') AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft\nodejstools\nodejstools%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Lolbin PressAnyKey and Download Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%microsoft.nodejstools.pressanykey.exe normal %' or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe normal %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe')) or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -t msi-install %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -i http%') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft\nodejstools\nodejstools%' AQL filter query
